allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const lines = fs.readFileSync\(''content/a_gift.mdx'', ''utf8''\).split\(''\\n''\); console.log\(''Lines 0-25:''\); lines.slice\(0, 25\).forEach\(\(l, i\) => console.log\(i + '':'', l\)\); console.log\(''...\\nLine 22 \(index where slice starts\):'', lines[22]\);")
